justification: The diff correctly migrates javax to jakarta namespaces and updates Spring/Hibernate versions to Java 21-compatible releases, but it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads). The removal of the JUnit 4 dependency is questionable since no replacement is added, potentially breaking tests. The use of @PostMapping instead of @RequestMapping is a good modernization, but the overall migration is mostly mechanical namespace/version updates without deeper Java 21 adoption.
